name: Tourial Interactive Demo API
what_it_does: Interactive product demo and tour platform with API — enabling marketing teams to create self-guided product demos embedded in websites, ads, and landing pages, with branching demo flows, lead capture, analytics, and integrations with marketing automation platforms for demand generation.
use_cases: Embedding interactive product demos in website landing pages for prospect self-service
Querying demo engagement analytics (views, completions, lead captures) via API
Integrating Tourial lead capture data with CRM and marketing automation via webhook
Managing demo library and sharing demos with sales team for outbound use
Automating demo personalization for ABM campaigns based on account attributes
not_for: Live demo environments with actual product functionality (use Demostack or Reprise)
Video recording and async communication (use Loom)
Complex multi-step interactive application demos (use Navattic)
best_when: A marketing team wants self-serve interactive demos embedded in demand generation campaigns (ads, landing pages, email) that capture leads while prospects explore the product.
avoid_when: You need actual product sandbox environments, live sales demos, or simple screenshot-based demos without lead capture (use Arcade for lighter approach).

auth.notes: API key from Tourial account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. Webhook for lead capture events and demo completion events. No OAuth2. Lead data integrated with HubSpot, Marketo, Pardot, and Salesforce.

pricing.notes: Atlanta-based company. Founded 2020. Raised $12M. Lead capture forms within demos unique differentiator. Marketing team-focused (demand generation) vs sales team-focused tools. HubSpot, Marketo, Pardot native integrations. Demo analytics with heatmaps. ABM personalization capabilities.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for demos, leads, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Good documentation for core use cases. Demo creation is UI-driven — API for analytics and lead management. Webhook delivers lead capture data in real-time. Marketing automation integrations handle lead routing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Demo reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Lead reads idempotent by lead ID. Workspace reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Demo creation requires visual builder UI — API is primarily for analytics and lead data
Lead capture forms must be configured in demo builder before API lead retrieval
Webhook delivers lead data in real-time — implement idempotent webhook handler
GDPR consent for lead capture must be implemented via demo form settings
ABM personalization requires URL parameter configuration in demo links

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Lead capture data is PII — implement GDPR consent in demo forms. Demo analytics track user behavior — consent required for EU visitors.
